backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features with file targets, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for label renames and PDF layout updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and notable changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS variable tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, primary, and sidebar color roles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts, includes jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, and mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header with company branding, a hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Daily field report form managing time punch, personnel fields (including 'Assis Technician'), job details, photos, and PDF generation via generateReportPDF.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/clear functions and status flags backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module that exports nothing, noting that no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a dark industrial theme using CSS custom properties (oklch colors), plus reusable component classes for buttons and signature container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility module that generates a styled dark-themed PDF daily field report using jsPDF (loaded via CDN), including header, sections, and optional site photos.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow shadows, and animations; includes animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 37) recording existing features, known issues, architectural notes, and a summary for the SECENG Daily Report app.
